Name: Tier 1 - Highest Conviction
Description: Perfect intersection of d/acc alignment (★★★★★) with significant demonstrated market demand. These are technologies that enable verification without trust, privacy without central authority, and compliance without surveillance.
Market Opportunity Threshold: High - $10B+ projected or demonstrated institutional demand
Core Criteria: Must pass all Four D's criteria; shifts offense/defense balance decisively toward defense; cannot become new vector for centralization; addresses Vitalik's core concerns about AI-enabled surveillance and power concentration
Risk Tolerance: Medium - Willing to accept technical complexity and adoption uncertainty for fundamental d/acc alignment
Portfolio Allocation Guidance: Largest allocation; multiple positions within tier; long-term hold through volatility
Example Primitives: Zero-Knowledge Proofs, Decentralized Identity (DID), Zero-Knowledge Identity, Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE), Attestation Infrastructure, Reputation/Sybil Resistance
Example Projects: zkSync, StarkNet, Scroll, Aztec Network, Polygon ID, Gitcoin Passport, Zama, EAS, Semaphore, Zupass

Name: Tier 2 - Strong Conviction
Description: Excellent d/acc alignment (★★★★☆) with emerging but less proven market demand. Infrastructure enabling defensive capabilities that may not yet have demonstrated product-market fit.
Market Opportunity Threshold: Medium - $1-10B projected or growing adoption metrics
Core Criteria: Passes most Four D's criteria; clear defensive value; some centralization concerns acceptable if trajectory is toward decentralization; timing uncertainty acceptable
Risk Tolerance: Medium-High - Accept higher uncertainty on market timing and competitive dynamics
Portfolio Allocation Guidance: Moderate allocation; selective positions; willing to add on validation
Example Primitives: Data Availability Layers, Quadratic Funding, Multisig Infrastructure, Voting Mechanisms, Decentralized Storage, MPC, Rollups, Key Management, Stablecoins (decentralized)
Example Projects: Celestia, EigenDA, Avail, Safe, Allo Protocol, Hypercerts, Optimism, Arbitrum, Filecoin, Lit Protocol, DAI, Ethena

Name: Tier 3 - Selective Conviction
Description: Context-dependent d/acc alignment (★★★☆☆ or lower) requiring careful evaluation of specific implementations. May be critical infrastructure with concentration concerns or emerging categories with unclear trajectories.
Market Opportunity Threshold: Variable - May have large markets but d/acc alignment is implementation-specific
Core Criteria: Passes some Four D's criteria; important infrastructure but centralization tendencies; may require monitoring for trajectory changes; vacuum analysis may justify despite lower alignment
Risk Tolerance: High - Accept concentration risk or unclear d/acc trajectory for strategic infrastructure positions
Portfolio Allocation Guidance: Smaller allocation; highly selective; position sizing based on specific implementation quality; may be traded rather than held
Example Primitives: Oracle Infrastructure, Cross-Chain Bridges, Intent-Based Systems, Perpetual DEXs, AMMs, Lending/Borrowing, Indexing, Treasury Management
Example Projects: Chainlink, Pyth, Chronicle, LayerZero, CoW Protocol, Hyperliquid, Uniswap, Aave, The Graph, Sablier
